name: shahboura
description: Lean AI agent pack with 23 on-demand skills for development, security, documentation, and leadership.

plugins.name: agents-opencode
plugins.description: 23 on-demand skills: languages (.NET, Python, Go, Rust, etc.), quality (code review, security audit, refactoring), documentation (API docs, ADRs), content (blogging, critique), and leadership (EM, legal). Skills load on demand — no context cost until invoked.
